description: Version history manifest tracking the evolution of the AI Layoff Tracker dataset and API

changes: Initial release with 15-company dataset
4-tier classification system (Direct AI Replacement, AI Reallocation, AI-Driven Restructuring, Market Disruption)
Per-company, per-industry, per-country JSON API endpoints
Static site with search, filters, timeline, and interactive charts
Methodology page with full transparency documentation
Data dictionary with complete field documentation
Corrections workflow and submission system
Expanded dataset from 15 to 25 company entries
Corrections to several entry classifications based on community feedback
Improved source citations and verification notes
Added research notes field to entry schema
Refined industry categorization for enterprise software companies
Weekly validation report endpoint added
Schema v2 with confidence_score field (0-100 scale)
Source quality ratings (PRIMARY_SOURCE, SECONDARY_SOURCE, MEDIA_REPORT)
New per-entry confidence breakdowns via /api/confidence.json
Corrections schema formalized with structured diff format
Normalized date fields: announcement_date and effective_date
Added headquarters field to all company entries
API response now includes schema version header
Expanded to 42 static pages across the documentation site
Footer cleanup: removed stale links, added version indicator
Fixed broken internal links between company and industry pages
Added source-health.json endpoint for data freshness monitoring
Country-level API endpoints now include workforce impact percentages
Improved mobile responsiveness for charts and data tables
Expanded to 87 pages across full documentation site
Dedicated per-company report pages with timeline and source links
New /reports/ section with cross-company analysis and trend summaries
Community submission system for new layoff entries
API v1 finalized with stable endpoint structure
JSON-LD structured data embedded in all entity pages
Industry-level aggregation with classification breakdowns
Full site search with company, industry, and country facets
Data export now supports CSV alongside JSON
